howItWorks.intro: This rain barrel collection calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Collection
rules.explanation: Roof area times depth of rain times gallons per cubic foot.

howItWorks.outro: Energy costs and incentives change by region and season. Check with your local utility for current rates.

faq.q: How much water can I collect?
faq.a: A 1000 sq ft roof in 40 inches of rain = ~20,000 gallons per year.
For irrigation yes. For drinking, it needs filtration and treatment.
